name: com.rootsbybenda/pharma-regulatory
description: Pharmaceutical regulatory intelligence across DrugBank, WHO Essential Medicines, Australian TGA, and FDA. Drug-drug interaction checking with severity and management. FDA adverse event reports (FAERS). Full-text search across 7 pharmaceutical databases. Free. Source-linked.

tools.name: check_drug
tools.description: Multi-database drug lookup: DrugBank compound data, WHO Essential Medicines list, Australian TGA registered medicines, FDA new dietary ingredient notifications.

tools.name: check_drug_interactions
tools.description: Drug-drug interaction lookup by one or two drug names. Returns severity, mechanism, effect, and management guidance.

tools.name: check_adverse_events
tools.description: FDA FAERS adverse event summary for a drug. Total reports, serious outcomes, deaths, top adverse reactions, age group breakdown.

tools.name: search_pharma
tools.description: Full-text search across 7 pharmaceutical databases including DrugBank, WHO, TGA, FAERS, interactions, FDA NDI, and ChEMBL bioactivity.
